allow: Bash(sed -i 's/  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;/  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;\\n  max-width: 1280px;\\n  margin-left: auto;\\n  margin-right: auto;/' style.css)
Bash(sed -i 's/  padding: 20px 48px;/  padding: 20px clamp\(48px, calc\(\(100vw - 1280px\) \\/ 2 + 48px\), 9999px\);/' style.css)
